subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast sought illumination from the Light of the Guidance of God! Verily I read thy words... Know thou, verily, man before reaching (spiritual) maturity
subcodes.subjects: @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
